actors.name: Demos Helsinki
actors.description: Independent think tank and policy institute focusing on societal transformation, foresight, and long-term governance. Bridges foresight frameworks and practical policymaking.
actors.contact_pathway: Collaborates with Sitra on long-term governance and foresight initiatives
actors.notes: Not a direct collaborator candidate, but highly valuable for strategic foresight frameworks. Promotes anticipatory governance for future generations.

intel.value: Post-UN Summit of the Future initiatives to enhance Finland's long-term governance capabilities; frameworks operationalizing future awareness into intergenerational justice
Fingo, Sitra, National Foresight Network, Finland Futures Research Centre
Helsinki-based; leverages Finland's tradition of preparedness and high institutional trust
Expertise in translating foresight and anticipatory governance into actionable policy; intellectual architecture for multi-generational planetary governance
Anticipatory governance models integrating rights and needs of future generations into contemporary policy

actors.name: Institute for Futures Studies
actors.description: Interdisciplinary research organization investigating long-term societal threats and living conditions of future generations, focusing on climate ethics, sustainable development, and social dilemmas.
actors.contact_pathway: Operates within same academic and policy circles as Global Challenges Foundation
actors.notes: Not a direct collaborator candidate. Also known as IFFS or Institutet for Framtidsstudier.

intel.value: Research on normativization of climate emotions; future-oriented public attitudes across geopolitical contexts; rationing as climate policy mechanism
Academic networks across Sweden, Denmark, Poland, and Ukraine; IPCC-affiliated researchers
Stockholm-based Swedish research institute with interdisciplinary researchers affiliated with IPCC
Provides theoretical and ethical research for institutions representing future generations within Assembly framework; informs governance simulation design
Research on climate ethics, sustainable development, social dilemmas, climate emotions, and rationing as climate policy
Institute for Futures Studies (IFFS) operates within same academic and policy circles in Stockholm

search_phrases.phrase: Demos Helsinki anticipatory governance future generations
Institute for Futures Studies IFFS climate ethics Sweden
Finland long-term governance foresight UN Summit of the Future
